name: Moussaka
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add eggplant and sauté until lightly browned.
2. Add onion, zucchini, mushrooms, garlic, cinnamon, nutmeg, oregano, and allspice to the skillet with the eggplant. Stir well.
3. Cook vegetables for 10 minutes, adding more olive oil if needed to prevent sticking.
4. Add chopped tomatoes and cook an additional 5 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and stir in crumbled feta cheese and Bechamel sauce.
6. Pour mixture into a baking dish and sprinkle the chopped bell pepper on top.
7. Bake at 325°F for one hour or until bubbly and golden brown.
